summary: Iteration 92 — Public Notary Directory & Notary Profile Pages (Phase 2). All backend (15/15 pytest) and frontend e2e flows pass. Score History label refactor verified at code level (ScoreHistoryCard now uses two-column flex: labels in w-14 left column, SVG chart in flex-1 right column — labels can no longer overlap gridlines).
critical_code_review_comments: verify_routes.py list_public_notaries: per-row N+1 issuing 2 queries (notary_bonds + blockchain_seals.count) per notary. With 8 seeded notaries this is fine, but at >100 notaries this will be slow — consider batching with $lookup or in-memory join. Not a current bug.

list_public_notaries query filters role in ['notary','admin'] AND active!=False. Admin user is exposed in the public directory unless active=False — confirm this is intended (admin may not want public listing). Currently 8 results shown including admin profile.

verify_notary_public_profile fallback: if user is not notary/admin, the second find_one matches ANY user. This means /api/verify/notary/{id} can leak a regular user's id/full_name/role even though they're not a notary. Recommend tightening to role in ['notary','admin'] only.

NotaryDirectory pagination: PAGE_SIZE=24 hardcoded, but backend default limit=50. Consistent with 24 cards per grid — fine. Pagination only renders when total>24, verified on /notaries (8 notaries currently, no pagination shown).
NotaryProfile: window.location.href referenced during initial render — safe in browser SSR-free React, but worth noting for future SSR.

LivingIdentity.jsx ScoreHistoryCard refactor verified: tier labels (90 verified / 70 watch / 40 challenged) live in dedicated left column (w-14) with their own positioning relative to its container, while chart svg sits in flex-1. Labels can no longer overlap gridlines. Visual verification on demo@test.com not possible because user has no genesis anchor yet — Score History card only renders when score_history exists. Code-level fix is sound.
test_credentials: demo@test.com / Demo123! used for /identity check; both /notaries and /notary/:id are public — no auth required.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing 8 notaries seeded in db.users.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 public notary directory complete. Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/test_public_notary_directory.py (run: pytest backend/tests/test_public_notary_directory.py -v). Verified data-testids: notary-directory-page, directory-search-input, directory-search-btn, directory-state-filter, directory-total, directory-loading, directory-results, directory-empty, directory-pagination, pagination-prev, pagination-next, notary-card-{id}, notary-profile-page, notary-profile-not-found, notary-profile-loading, back-to-directory, notary-name, notary-status-ring, notary-stats-card, stat-seals, stat-ceremonies, stat-flags, notary-license-card, notary-bond-card, notary-no-bond-card, notary-trust-card, notary-book-card, notary-share-card, copy-notary-id, share-profile-link, verify-document-cta, book-notary-cta. /verify Notary tab cross-link 'browse-directory-link' → /notaries verified.
verified_flows: GET /api/verify/notaries?q=<lowercased fragment of seeded name> → total>=1 (case-insensitive)
GET /api/verify/notaries?limit=1&offset=0 vs offset=1 → returns different notaries (pagination works)
GET /api/verify/notary/{valid_id} → 200 with verified=true, notary_id, name, role, license_*, bond, stats{total_seals,total_ceremonies,active_fraud_flags}
Frontend /notaries → notary-directory-page testid renders, 8 cards under directory-results testid, total='8 notaries found'
Frontend state filter CA + search btn → 0 notaries (no CA-licensed seed), then directory-empty visible after search 'ZZZNOTARYNOTFOUND'
Click first notary card → routes to /notary/:id, notary-profile-page renders, notary-name='GHL Hook Tester', stat-seals visible
Click back-to-directory → returns to /notaries with directory-page
Frontend /verify Notary tab → browse-directory-link with href='/notaries' present and clickable
Console errors during /notaries + /notary/:id full e2e: 0 (only 2 unrelated 404 resource fetches from /verify page favicons)
Login as demo@test.com → /identity page renders (Genesis Anchor screen shown, no Score History card because no anchor yet); ScoreHistoryCard refactor verified at code level
rca of the issue: No bugs reproduced. Two soft observations: (1) /api/verify/notary/{id} fallback accepts ANY user (not just notary/admin) — recommend restricting to role in ['notary','admin'] to avoid leaking regular user info via direct id lookup. (2) Admin user appears in public /api/verify/notaries directory (8 results includes admin profile 'GHL Hook Tester') — confirm if intentional. Both are tightening recommendations, not blockers.
